Ghostbusters (2016)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $128,350,574Details
International Box Office $100,658,084
Worldwide Box Office $229,008,658
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $17,281,378
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $22,040,709
Total $39,322,087
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A paranormal researcher, a physicist, a nuclear engineer and a subway worker try to rid New York of ghosts that can possess humans.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$46,018,755 (35.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.79 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:56.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$144,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,963 opening theaters/3,963 max. theaters, 4.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $177,465,075

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 15th, 2016 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: July 13th, 2016 (Wide) (Jamaica)
July 14th, 2016 (Wide) (Curacao)
July 14th, 2016 (Wide) (Thailand)
July 14th, 2016 (Wide) (Taiwan)
July 14th, 2016 (Wide) (Suriname)
Video Release: September 27th, 2016 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for supernatural action and some crude humor.
(Rating bulletin 2430 (Cert #49737), 6/22/2016)
Running Time: 117 minutes
Franchise: Ghostbusters
Cast, crew, or production detail: Development Hell, Genderbending Casting, Gratuitous Cameos, Reboot

Subgenre: Horror Comedy

Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Animation/Live Action

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
